content: TASK-058 fixed endpoint-component border overlap: after the required perpendicular source/target stub, routes now reject segments that run parallel within 8px of their own component border. The supplied AOF governance graph now places the Orchestrator-to-Runtime horizontal track at y=160.4, clear of the Orchestrator bottom border at y=117.6. Verification passed: typecheck, 237 tests, build, and browser coordinate inspection. Release v0.2.0 remains complete on GitHub; npm publication is still a human action requiring an npm account with @archmap/core ownership, followed by npm/jsDelivr verification.
